title: F2 Generation
summary: The second filial generation — produced by self-pollinating F1 individuals (Yy × Yy). The F2 shows the classic 3:1 phenotypic ratio (dominant : recessive) and 1:2:1 genotype ratio (YY : Yy : yy). The reappearance of the recessive trait in F2 was Mendel's key clue that traits are inherited as discrete units (alleles), not blended.
